item.title: New version: devel/claude-code version 2.1.81
item.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: devel/gh version 2.88.1
item.description: gh is GitHub on the command line. It brings pull requests, issues, and other GitHub concepts to the terminal next to where you are already working with git and your code.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: devel/ollama version 0.18.0
item.description: Ollama is a free, open-source platform that allows users to run large language models (LLMs) locally.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: system/gitlab-runner version 18.9.0
item.description: GitLab Runner is the open source project that is used to run your CI/CD jobs and send the results back to GitLab.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: devel/copilot-cli version 1.0.5
item.description: GitHub Copilot CLI brings the power of Copilot coding agent directly to your terminal.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: system/ripgrep version 15.1.0
item.description: ripgrep is a line-oriented search tool that recursively searches the current directory for a regex pattern.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New module: devel/opencode version 1.2.24
item.description: OpenCode is an open source AI coding agent.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: devel/bun version 1.3.10
item.description: Bun is a fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: biology/dorado version 1.4.0
item.description: Dorado is a high-performance, easy-to-use, open source basecaller for Oxford Nanopore reads.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New module: biology/mash version 2.3
item.description: Fast genome and metagenome distance estimation using MinHash
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: math/gsl version 2.8
item.description: The GNU Scientific Library (GSL) is a numerical library for C and C++ programmers. The library provides a wide range of mathematical routines such as random number generators, special functions and least-squares fitting.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: devel/uv version 0.10.8
item.description: An extremely fast Python package and project manager, written in Rust.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: devel/codex version 0.98.0
item.description: Codex CLI is a coding agent from OpenAI that runs locally on your computer.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New module: biology/py-checkm2 version 1.1.0_py312
item.description: Rapid assessment of genome bin quality using machine learning.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New module: biology/prodigal version 2.6.3
item.description: Fast, reliable protein-coding gene prediction for prokaryotic genomes.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New module: biology/diamond version 2.1.23
item.description: Accelerated BLAST compatible local sequence aligner.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: biology/cellranger version 10.0.0
item.description: Cell Ranger is a set of analysis pipelines that process Chromium single-cell RNA-seq output to align reads, generate gene-cell matrices and perform clustering and gene expression analysis.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New module: system/py-librosa version 0.11.0_py312
item.description: Python library for audio and music analysis.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New module: system/py-librosa version 0.11.0_py39
item.description: Python library for audio and music analysis.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New module: biology/py-drep version 3.4.2_py312
item.description: Rapid comparison and dereplication of genomes.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: math/gurobi version 13.0.1
item.description: The Gurobi Optimizer is a commercial optimization solver for mathematical programming.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: devel/swig version 4.4.1
item.description: SWIG is an interface compiler that connects programs written in C and C++ with scripting languages such as Perl, Python, Ruby, and Tcl.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: devel/ollama version 0.16.2
item.description: Ollama is a free, open-source platform that allows users to run large language models (LLMs) locally.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: system/rclone version 1.73.1
item.description: Rclone is a command line program to sync files and directories to and from
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: system/py-duckdb version 1.4.4_py314
item.description: Python bindings for DuckDB
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: devel/claude-code version 2.1.38
item.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: devel/ollama version 0.15.5
item.description: Ollama is a free, open-source platform that allows users to run large language models (LLMs) locally.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New module: biology/py-alphagenome version 0.5.1_py312
item.description: The AlphaGenome API provides access to AlphaGenome, Google DeepMind’s unifying model for deciphering the regulatory code within DNA sequences.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: math/scotch version 7.0.10
item.description: Software package and libraries for sequential and parallel graph partitioning, static mapping and clustering, sequential mesh and hypergraph partitioning, and sequential and parallel sparse matrix block ordering.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New module: devel/flex version 2.6.4
item.description: Flex is a fast lexical analyzer generator.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New module: devel/bison version 3.8.2
item.description: Bison is a general-purpose parser generator.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New module: biology/py-anvio version 9_py312
item.description: An analysis and visualization platform for omics data.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: biology/py-ete version 3.3.1_py312
item.description: A Python framework for the analysis and visualization of trees.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: devel/copilot-cli version 0.0.393
item.description: GitHub Copilot CLI brings the power of Copilot coding agent directly to your terminal.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: devel/code-server version 4.108.1
item.description: Run VS Code on any machine anywhere and access it in the browser.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: devel/codex version 0.88.0
item.description: Codex CLI is a coding agent from OpenAI that runs locally on your computer.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: system/restic version 0.18.1
item.description: Fast, secure, efficient backup program.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: devel/gemini-cli version 0.23.0
item.description: An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)

item.title: New version: devel/bun version 1.3.5
item.description: Bun is a fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one.
item.author: kilian@stanford.edu (Kilian Cavalotti)
